macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Energy Prices Surge Amid Ongoing War with Iran
items.summary: Gas and oil prices continue to rise sharply due to the war with Iran, with U.S. gas prices topping $4 per gallon for the first time since 2022. Companies are adopting fuel surcharges, driving up shipping and airline costs.

items.title: March Jobs Report Shows Strong Hiring Despite Oil Shock
items.summary: The U.S. March jobs report indicates hiring picked up strongly, even amid rising oil prices from the Iran war. Jobless aid filings fell to 202,000 as layoffs remain low.

items.title: Oil Prices Storm Higher on War Escalation
items.summary: Global oil prices are surging due to escalating war with Iran, with geopolitical tensions also threatening aluminum prices and impacting broader markets.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: $64.6 Million in Crypto Liquidations Over Past 24 Hours
items.summary: Coinglass data indicates $64.62 million in total liquidations across crypto markets in the past 24 hours, with $24.85 million in long positions and $39.77 million in shorts liquidated. Bitcoin shorts saw $7.81 million in liquidations, while Ethereum shorts reached $9.08 million.

items.title: Bitcoin Trades Between $66,612 and $67,563, Currently at $67,017
items.summary: Bitcoin has fluctuated between $66,612 and $67,563 over the past 24 hours, trading at $67,017 as of 09:30 AM UTC, up 0.06%. BNB has flipped XRP in market rankings amid BTC slipping below $67K.

items.title: Study Shows Bitcoin Outperforms Gold and S&P 500 After Global Shocks
items.summary: Mercado Bitcoin research reveals Bitcoin surged 24% after Trump's 2025 tariff announcement, outperforming gold's 8% and S&P 500's 4% gains; similar patterns seen post-COVID with 21% BTC rise. Spot Bitcoin ETFs saw $1.32 billion inflows in March, contrasting gold ETFs' outflows.

items.title: Institutional Bitcoin Buying Battles Whale Selling Pressure
items.summary: Institutional demand for Bitcoin has hit record highs via ETFs and corporations, but whales holding 1,000-10,000 BTC have reversed to aggressive selling, creating net outflows and price pressure. This tug-of-war defines current market dynamics.

items.title: Top Volume Cryptos: JuChain Surges 16.52% in 24h, Cartesi Up 100.64%
items.summary: JuChain (JU) leads with +16.52% in 24 hours and $1.71B volume, Cartesi (CTSI) jumps 100.64% with $75.74M volume, while Solana (SOL) at $80.91 shows minor +0.51% change.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: PrismML Releases 1-Bit Bonsai 8B Model
items.summary: PrismML released Bonsai 8B on April 4, 2026, a 1-bit large language model fitting in 1.15 GB of memory with benchmark parity to larger models. It is 14x smaller, 8x faster, and 5x more energy efficient on edge hardware, available under Apache 2.0 license.

items.title: UCLA Researchers Propose Internal Embodiment for AI
items.summary: UCLA Health researchers published a Neuron paper proposing 'internal embodiment' for multimodal LLMs to monitor internal states like fatigue and uncertainty. They introduce a dual-embodiment framework and new benchmarks to enhance model safety and alignment.

items.title: MLCommons Releases MLPerf Inference v6.0 Benchmark Results
items.summary: MLCommons announced results for MLPerf Inference v6.0 with submissions from 24 organizations, including a record 30% increase in multi-node systems. The largest submission featured 72 nodes and 288 accelerators, testing real-world AI deployment scenarios.

items.title: Lund University AI Model Detects Multiple Brain Diseases from Single Blood Sample
items.summary: Researchers at Lund University developed an AI model using proteomics data from over 17,000 participants to detect Alzheimer's, Parkinson's, ALS, frontotemporal dementia, and stroke from one blood sample. The model outperforms prior versions and is published in Nature Medicine.

items.title: Zapier Launches AI Guardrails for Workflow Safety
items.summary: Zapier introduced AI Guardrails, embedding real-time safety checks in workflows to detect PII, prompt injections, and toxic content before AI outputs reach CRMs or databases.

items.title: Meta Freezes AI Data Work After Training Secrets Breach
items.summary: Meta halted AI data work following a breach that exposed training secrets, impacting model development.

items.title: Anthropic Restricts Claude Subscribers from OpenClaw in Cost Crackdown
items.summary: Anthropic announced Claude Code subscribers must pay extra for OpenClaw usage and cut off access in a cost-saving measure.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Starfield PS5 Launch and Free Lanes Update Coming April 7
items.summary: Starfield is launching on PlayStation 5 on April 7, 2026, alongside a major free update called Free Lanes and a paid DLC expansion called Terran Armada.

items.title: VR Gaming Industry Adjusting After Major Layoffs and Studio Closures
items.summary: The VR gaming industry is undergoing significant restructuring in 2026, with major companies like Meta and Sony reducing investment, leading to smaller teams and tighter budgets. Upcoming VR titles include Little Nightmares VR, Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles VR, and Microsoft Flight Simulator VR mode for PSVR 2.

items.title: Intel's Nova Lake AX Processor Specs Discussed
items.summary: Tech news coverage on April 5, 2026 discusses Intel's mysterious Nova Lake AX processor, with rumors suggesting it could feature up to 28 CPU cores and 48 GPU cores, though its actual launch remains uncertain.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
